recommendations.title: The White Tiger
recommendations.overview: An ambitious Indian driver uses his wit and cunning to escape from poverty and rise to the top. An epic journey based on the New York Times bestseller.

recommendations.title: Fahrenheit 451
recommendations.overview: In an oppressive future, a 'fireman' whose duty is to destroy all books begins to question his task.

recommendations.title: 99 Homes
recommendations.overview: After his family is evicted from their home, proud and desperate construction worker Dennis Nash tries to win his home back by striking a deal with the devil and working for Rick Carver, the corrupt real estate broker who evicted him.

recommendations.title: 3 Idiots
recommendations.overview: Rascal. Joker. Dreamer. Genius... You've never met a college student quite like "Rancho." From the moment he arrives at India's most prestigious university, Rancho's outlandish schemes turn the campus upside down—along with the lives of his two newfo

recommendations.title: Enemy of the State
recommendations.overview: When the videotape of the murder of a congressman unknowingly ends up in the hands of labor lawyer and dedicated family man Robert Clayton Dean, he is framed for the murder. With the help of the mysterious Brill, Dean attempts to throw the NSA off hi

recommendations.title: Scandalous Sex
recommendations.overview: A daughter seeks to restore the reputation of her disgraced father, a wronged college professor. With help of a professional student, she must overcome an ambitious sorority bitch and corrupt college dean.

recommendations.title: Animal House
recommendations.overview: At a 1962 College, Dean Vernon Wormer is determined to expel the entire Delta Tau Chi Fraternity, but those troublemakers have other plans for him.

recommendations.title: Go!
recommendations.overview: Jack is a charismatic larrikin who has just discovered the one thing he's really good at — go-kart racing. With the support of his mentor, Patrick, an old race car driver with a secret past, and his best mates Colin and Mandy, Jack must learn to cont

recommendations.title: Cars 3
recommendations.overview: Blindsided by a new generation of blazing-fast racers, the legendary Lightning McQueen is suddenly pushed out of the sport he loves. To get back in the game, he will need the help of an eager young race technician with her own plan to win, inspiratio

recommendations.title: Death of a Cyclist
recommendations.overview: A couple having an affair strike a bicyclist with their car and do not offer aid out of fear of their relationship being exposed.
